name: autobiography-of-a-spiritually-incorrect-mystic
description: Osho's Autobiography of a Spiritually Incorrect Mystic — a spiritual autobiography from one of the most controversial spiritual teachers of the 20th century, covering his enlightenment, dynamic meditation, the Rajneeshpuram commune, and his teachings on consciousness, love, and freedom.
useCase: Understand Osho's radical approach to spirituality — meditation techniques, enlightenment, and the path of awareness and rebellion.
knownRisks: Osho is a deeply controversial figure — some view him as enlightened, others as a cult leader
The book presents his perspective — does not provide balanced coverage of controversies
His teachings on sex and relationships may offend some readers
